tool_args.raw_text: January 2021 MTA Board Action Items. MTA Board Meeting 2 Broadway 20th Floor Board Room New York, N.Y. 10004 Thursday, 1/21/2021 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET

payload.content_type: board meeting minutes and action items
payload.title: MTA Board Action Items
payload.description: MTA Board meeting action items for January 21, 2021, including minutes from the December 16, 2020 Joint Committee and Regular Board meeting, procurement actions, real estate items, and agency president reports.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA Board Meeting January 21, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Board Meeting 2 Broadway 20th Floor Board Room New York, N.Y. 10004 Thursday, 1/21/2021 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET

payload.description: MTA Board meeting held at 2 Broadway 20th Floor Board Room, New York, N.Y. 10004. Meeting included budget adoption, procurement approvals, real estate items, and agency president reports.

tool_args.label: Joint Committee and Board Meeting December 16, 2020
tool_args.raw_text: Joint Committee and Board Meeting of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority... Wednesday, December 16, 2020 10:00 a.m. ... the Board voted to adjourn the meeting at 12:34 p.m.

payload.description: Joint Committee and Board Meeting of the MTA and its agencies. Meeting adjourned at 12:34 p.m. Minutes approved at January 21, 2021 meeting.

tool_args.label: MTA 2021 Budget Adoption
tool_args.raw_text: Upon motion duly made and seconded, the Board approved the Adoption of the MTA 2021 Final Proposed Budget and 2021-2024 Financial Plan.

payload.description: The Board approved the Adoption of the MTA 2021 Final Proposed Budget and 2021-2024 Financial Plan.

tool_args.label: Westbury Parking Garage
tool_args.raw_text: The Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) seeks MTA Board approval to establish parking fees for 300 unrestricted daily parking spaces located in the newly constructed Westbury Parking Garage. The State of the art, 4 level, ungated garage is expected to open in March 2021.

payload.description: State of the art, 4 level, ungated parking garage at Westbury station constructed as part of LIRR's Main Line Expansion project. 667 spaces total; 367 reserved for Village of Westbury resident permit holders, 300 open to all patrons on first come first served basis.

tool_args.label: ADA Accessibility Upgrades at Eight Stations
tool_args.raw_text: a competitively solicited design-build contract for accessibility upgrades at eight stations in the five boroughs of New York City in the amount of $153,225,838 to Judlau Contracting, Inc. ... installation of 17 new elevators that will provide full accessibility to each of the eight stations.

payload.project_name: Accessibility Upgrades at Eight Stations in the Five Boroughs
payload.description: Design-build contract for accessibility upgrades at eight stations including installation of 17 new elevators. Contract awarded to Judlau Contracting Inc. for $153,225,838. Also includes 15-year elevator maintenance contract with Modern Elevator Installations, Inc. for $8,144,593.

tool_args.label: Procurement of 50 Low-Floor 40-Foot Diesel Buses for MTA Bus Company
tool_args.raw_text: Procurement of 50 low-floor 40-foot diesel buses for MTA Bus Company with an option for 85 additional buses.

payload.project_name: Purchase of 50 low-floor 40-foot diesel buses for MTA Bus Company
payload.description: Procurement of 50 low-floor 40-foot diesel buses for MTA Bus Company with an option for 85 additional buses. Buses will replace aging buses that have reached end of their 12-year useful life. Operated out of MTABC depots in Queens.

tool_args.label: Procurement of 19 Dual-Mode Locomotives for Metro-North
tool_args.raw_text: Board approval to award a competitively solicited contract to the firm Siemens Mobility Inc. in the total amount of $334,873,148. This contract is for the design, manufacture, testing, and delivery of nineteen (19) dual-mode locomotives and related locomotive equipment and for Metro-North to exercise an initial option to purchase eight (8) additional locomotives.

payload.project_name: Design, manufacture, testing, and delivery of 19 dual-mode locomotives with option for 8 additional
payload.description: Contract with Siemens Mobility Inc. for $334,873,148 for design, manufacture, testing, and delivery of 19 dual-mode locomotives and related equipment. LIRR, CTDOT, and NYSDOT may exercise options.

tool_args.label: Maintenance, Inspection and Repair Services for MNR and LIRR Escalators
tool_args.raw_text: maintenance, inspection and repair services for a total of 53 escalators for MNR and Long Island Rail Road combined

payload.project_name: Maintenance, Inspection and Repair Services for MNR and LIRR Escalators
payload.description: Request to use RFP process for maintenance, inspection and repair services for 53 escalators total: MNR's 15 escalators in Grand Central Terminal, 2 at White Plains station; LIRR's 20 escalators at various commuter stations and 16 in Penn Station.

tool_args.label: Thales Signaling Global Maintenance Contract
tool_args.raw_text: A five-year estimated quantity miscellaneous service contract to provide maintenance and support services for various NYC Transit signaling systems.

payload.description: Five-year estimated quantity miscellaneous service contract with Thales Transport & Security, Inc. for maintenance and support services for various NYC Transit signaling systems. Total estimated amount $59,235,090. Systems include Flushing line CBTC, Flushing line ATS, 1st Avenue SSI, Bergen Street SSI, Queens Boulevard line CBTC.

tool_args.label: MTA Automated Vehicle Location Monitoring System
tool_args.raw_text: Board approval is sought to award a competitively negotiated miscellaneous services contract to LB Technology Inc. for implementation of Automated Vehicle Location Monitoring System (AVLM) for all MTA Agencies for up to seven (7) years.

payload.project_name: Implementation of MTA Automated Vehicle Location Monitoring System (AVLM)
payload.description: Competitively negotiated contract with LB Technology Inc. for up to 7 years, not-to-exceed $4,026,393. System replaces current AVLM, covers approximately 2,500 non-passenger fleet vehicles across LIRR, NYCT, B&T, and Metro-North.

tool_args.label: Potential Service Cuts Warning
tool_args.raw_text: massive service cuts of up to 50% on the railroads and up to 40% on subways and buses; the gutting of the MTA's historic Capital Plan; fare and toll increases above what had been planned; and laying off more than 9,000 of the agency's hardworking colleagues

payload.claim_text: Without $4.5 billion in federal aid, MTA may need to consider massive service cuts of up to 40% on subways and buses and 50% on commuter rail, and laying off more than 9,000 employees.
payload.subject: MTA service cuts

tool_args.label: East Side Access Traction Power Substations Stray Current Cable
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction and Development seeks Board approval to award a contract modification for furnishing and installing approximately 9,500 feet of 500 MCM (ground) stray current drainage cable for the C04 and C05 Traction Power Substations for the East Side Access Project.

payload.project_name: East Side Access - Traction Power Substations Stray Current Drainage Cable
payload.description: Contract modification for furnishing and installing approximately 9,500 feet of 500 MCM stray current drainage cable for C04 and C05 Traction Power Substations for the East Side Access Project. Awarded to E-J Electric Installation Co. for $1,510,000.

tool_args.label: East Side Access Systems Facilities Modification
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction and Development requests the Board ratify a retroactive modification for revisions to the Building Management, Fire Command Center, and fire detection/suppression systems for the East Side Access Project.

payload.project_name: East Side Access - Systems Facilities Package No. 1 Modification
payload.description: Retroactive modification to Tutor Perini Corporation contract for revisions to Building Management, Fire Command Center, and fire detection/suppression systems. $2,363,601. Includes joint MNR-LIRR Fire Command Center at GCT.

tool_args.label: Lease Agreement with Swarovski Retail Ventures Ltd. at Grand Central Terminal
tool_args.raw_text: Lease with Swarovski Retail Ventures Ltd. for retail space on the Main Concourse, Grand Central Terminal, New York, New York

payload.description: Authorization to enter into a 5-year lease with Swarovski Retail Ventures Ltd. for retail space MC-32 (590 sq ft) on the Main Concourse in Grand Central Terminal. Guaranteed annual minimum rent ranging from $100,000 (Year 1) to $200,000 (Years 3-5) with percentage rent.

tool_args.label: Lease Agreement with Hudson Group Retail LLC at Grand Central Terminal
tool_args.raw_text: Lease agreement with Hudson Group (HG) Retail, LLC. for retail space on the Main Concourse in Grand Central Terminal, New York, New York

payload.description: Authorization to enter into a 5-year lease with Hudson Group (HG) Retail LLC for retail space MC-21 (2,327 sq ft) on the Main Concourse in Grand Central Terminal. Guaranteed annual minimum rent ranging from $535,000 (Year 1) to $978,500 (Year 5) with 15% percentage rent.

tool_args.label: License Agreement with Sammarco Stone & Supply at New Rochelle
tool_args.raw_text: License agreement with Sammarco Stone & Supply, Inc. for use of vacant land in New Rochelle, New York

payload.description: Authorization to enter into a 10-year license with Sammarco Stone & Supply, Inc. for use of vacant land (12,000 sq ft) adjacent to Lispenard Avenue in New Rochelle, NY for parking, storage and distribution of masonry and non-hazardous building supplies. Compensation: $19,000 year one with 3% annual increases.

tool_args.raw_text: The State of the art, 4 level, ungated garage is expected to open in March 2021.

payload.description: The newly constructed Westbury Parking Garage is expected to open in March 2021. 4-level ungated garage with 667 spaces.

payload.description: New entrance at 7th Avenue and 33rd Street at Penn Station opened to the public, giving Penn Station a front door identity on Seventh Avenue with direct access from street level to LIRR and NYC Transit's 1, 2, 3 and A, C, E subway lines.
